chunks.text: Zack Phillips and Michael Chen win 2016 Qualcomm Innovation Fellowship - EECS at Berkeley EECS graduate students Zack Phillips and Michael Chen, who work with Prof. Laura Waller in the Computational Imaging Lab, have been selected to receive a 2016 Qualcomm Innovation Fellowship. They will receive $100k over one year to build a novel new computational illumination microscope attachment for cheap and easy biological microscopy in a portable device. Categories Entrepreneurship Honors Industry Research Students View Open Faculty Positions
